glosses.ja: ひっくり返す; 打倒する

sentences.target: Je renverse mon café sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɑ̃vɛʁs mɔ̃ kafe syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Je renverse mon café sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɑ̃vɛʁs mɔ̃ kafe syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: I spill my coffee on the table.
translations.es: Derramo mi café sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Ich verschütte meinen Kaffee auf dem Tisch.
translations.yue: 我啲咖啡瀉咗喺檯面上。
translations.he: אני שופך את הקפה שלי על השולחן.
translations.vi: Tôi làm đổ cà phê lên bàn.
translations.nl: Ik mors mijn koffie op tafel.
translations.hi: मैं मेज़ पर अपनी कॉफ़ी गिराता हूँ.
translations.el: Χύνω τον καφέ μου πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Jeg søler kaffen min på bordet.
translations.id: Aku menumpahkan kopi di atas meja.
translations.da: Jeg spilder min kaffe på bordet.
translations.ja: 私はテーブルの上にコーヒーをこぼす。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of spilling/overturning.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies the noun 'café'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb 'renverse'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu renverses toujours le sel en cuisinant.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃vɛʁs tuʒuʁ lə sɛl ɑ̃ kɥizinɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu renverses toujours le sel en cuisinant.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃vɛʁs tuʒuʁ lə sɛl ɑ̃ kɥizinɑ̃/
translations.en: You always knock over the salt while cooking.
translations.es: Siempre vuelcas el salero al cocinar.
translations.de: Du kippst beim Kochen immer den Salzstreuer um.
translations.it: Rovesci sempre il sale mentre cucini.
translations.ko: 너는 요리할 때 항상 소금통을 넘어뜨려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你做饭时总是把盐罐打翻。
translations.yue: 你煮嘢食嗰陣成日打翻鹽罐。
translations.ru: Ты всегда опрокидываешь солонку, когда готовишь.
translations.pt: Você sempre derruba o saleiro enquanto cozinha.
translations.he: אתה תמיד מפיל את המלחייה כשאתה מבשל.
translations.vi: Bạn luôn làm đổ lọ muối khi nấu ăn.
translations.ar: أنت دائمًا تقلب المملحة أثناء الطهي.
translations.nl: Je laat podczas het koken altijd het zoutpotje omvallen.
translations.uk: Ти завжди перекидаєш солонку, коли готуєш.
translations.hu: Főzés közben mindig felborítod a sótartót.
translations.hi: तुम खाना बनाते समय हमेशा नमकदानी गिरा देते हो.
translations.el: Πάντα ρίχνεις την αλατιέρα όταν μαγειρεύεις.
translations.nb: Du velter alltid saltbøssa når du lager mat.
translations.id: Kamu selalu menjatuhkan tempat garam saat memasak.
translations.sv: Du välter alltid saltkarret när du lagar mat.
translations.da: Du vælter altid saltbøssen, når du laver mad.
translations.fi: Kaadat aina suolasirottimen kumoon, kun kokkaat.
translations.ja: あなたは料理中にいつも塩入れを倒す。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; the action performed by 'tu'.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'renverses'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'sel'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'renverses'.
Preposition forming a gerund construction ('en' + present participle) expressing circumstance/manner.
Present participle used in a gerundive phrase with 'en'; adverbial modifier meaning 'while cooking'.

sentences.target: Nous renversons la plante en passant.

translations.fr: Nous renversons la plante en passant.
translations.en: We knock over the plant as we pass.
translations.de: Wir stoßen die Pflanze beim Vorbeigehen um.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们经过时把植物碰倒。
translations.yue: 我哋經過嗰陣打翻咗盆栽。
translations.he: אנחנו מפילים את הצמח כשאנחנו עוברים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi làm đổ chậu cây khi đi ngang qua.
translations.nl: We stoten de plant om als we langslopen.
translations.hi: हम गुजरते हुए पौधा गिरा देते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi velter planten mens vi går forbi.
translations.id: Kami menjatuhkan pot tanaman saat lewat.
translations.sv: Vi välter växten när vi går förbi.
translations.da: Vi vælter planten, når vi går forbi.
translations.ja: 私たちは通りがかるときに鉢植えを倒す。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; action of overturning/knocking over.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'plante'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'renversons'.
Preposition introducing a gerundive phrase; marks circumstance ('in/while').
Present participle used with 'en'; adverbial modifier meaning 'in passing'.

sentences.target: Fais attention à ne pas renverser le verre.
sentences.reading: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ a nə pa ʁɑ̃vɛʁse lə vɛʁ/

translations.fr: Fais attention à ne pas renverser le verre.
translations.ipa: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ a nə pa ʁɑ̃vɛʁse lə vɛʁ/
translations.en: Be careful not to knock over the glass.
translations.es: Ten cuidado de no volcar el vaso.
translations.de: Pass auf, dass du das Glas nicht umstößt.
translations.it: Fai attenzione a non rovesciare il bicchiere.
translations.pt: Cuidado para não derrubar o copo.
translations.vi: Cẩn thận đừng làm đổ cái ly.
translations.nl: Let op dat je het glas niet omstoot.
translations.hu: Vigyázz, ne borítsd fel a poharat.
translations.hi: ध्यान रखो कि गिलास न गिर जाए.
translations.el: Πρόσεχε να μην ρίξεις το ποτήρι.
translations.nb: Vær forsiktig så du ikke velter glasset.
translations.sv: Var försiktig så att du inte välter glaset.
translations.ro: Ai grijă să nu răstorni paharul.
translations.da: Pas på ikke a vælte glasset.
translations.ja: グラスを倒さないように気をつけτε。

tokens.explanation: Verb in imperative, 2nd person singular; part of the idiom 'faire attention' meaning to be careful.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement/direct object of 'fais' in the idiomatic expression.
Preposition introducing an infinitival clause indicating what to be careful about.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas' before the infinitive.
Negation adverb; second element of 'ne ... pas', completing the negative scope.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'à', expressing the action to avoid.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'verre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'renverser'.

Fais attention à ne pas renverser le verre.

Du kippst beim Kochen immer den Salzstreuer um.
Wir stoßen die Pflanze beim Vorbeigehen um.
